page.subtitle: Side-by-side pricing plan cards with native Wix checkout
manage.previewSubtitle: Updates as you edit plans and theme.
manage.plansSubtitle: Drag to reorder, then save to publish.
manage.themeSubtitle: Control how plan cards look on your site.
manage.freeLimit: Free plan includes up to 3 plan cards. Upgrade to add more.
onboarding.slide1.title: Welcome to Pricing Plans Compare
onboarding.slide1.body: Build beautiful side-by-side plan cards that connect to native Wix Pricing Plans checkout.
onboarding.slide2.title: Manage plans in one place
onboarding.slide2.body: Add up to four plan cards, reorder them, and highlight your recommended option.
onboarding.slide3.title: Match your brand
onboarding.slide3.body: Choose Light, Dark, Minimal, or Brand themes and tune colors, fonts, and card styles.
onboarding.slide4.title: Publish to your site
onboarding.slide4.body: Drop the widget anywhere, then save once to push live data to visitors.
celebration.title: Plans saved!
celebration.subtitle: Your pricing table is ready for the live site.
pricing.title: Choose your app plan
pricing.subtitle: Upgrade anytime from the Wix App Market.
pricing.downgradeTooltip: Downgrades are managed in your Wix subscription settings.
howTo.step1.title: Add the widget
howTo.step1.body: Open the Wix Editor, go to Add Elements → Apps, and place Pricing Plans Compare on your page.
howTo.step2.title: Create your plans
howTo.step2.body: In the Manage tab, add plan cards with prices, features, and CTAs. Link Wix Pricing Plans for native checkout.
howTo.step3.title: Style your table
howTo.step3.body: Pick a theme, highlight color, and card style. Premium unlocks badges and advanced design controls.
howTo.step4.title: Save and publish
howTo.step4.body: Click Save, then publish your site so visitors see the latest plan cards.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Each card can open Wix Pricing Plan checkout, a custom URL, or a Wix Form contact modal.
faq.q2: What is the free plan limit?
faq.a2: Free includes up to 3 plan cards, basic themes, and a small widget watermark.
faq.a3: Premium unlocks Most Popular, New, and Crown badges on individual plan cards.
faq.q4: Does Brand theme use my site colors?
faq.a4: Yes. Brand reads your Wix site palette so cards match your site without manual color picking.
faq.a5: Use the move up/down controls in the Manage tab, then Save to publish the new order.
help.title: Need Help?
help.subtitle: Our team replies within 24h — Premium gets VIP priority.
moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.frequentlyBoughtTogetherDesc: Boost average order value with smart upsells.
moreApps.customAdditionalFeesDesc: Add fees at checkout for services and extras.
panel.hint: All plan and theme settings are managed in the app dashboard.
